summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
Rem Rem Catering is a Birmingham-based food delivery and catering service specializing in freshly prepared Nigerian meals, offering door-to-door delivery across the UK. They provide a variety of authentic Nigerian dishes including rice dishes, meats, and sides, combining exotic flavors with fresh produce to deliver an experience of uncompromising taste and quality.

## Company Overview
Rem Rem Catering Ltd is a food delivery and catering service based in Birmingham that specializes in providing freshly prepared Nigerian meals to homes, local universities, businesses, and events. Their cooking combines exotic flavors with fresh produce and vegetables, giving customers an experience of uncompromising taste and quality of authentic Nigerian food.

## Contact Information
- **Email:** info@remremcatering.com
- **Phone:** 050 202 3319
- **Website:** www.remremcatering.com

## Key Offerings
Rem Rem Catering offers a diverse menu of Nigerian dishes, including:
- **Rice Dishes:** Jollof Rice, White Rice & Stew, Fried Rice, Ofada Rice
- **Meat Dishes:** Assorted Meat, Peppered Gizzard, Dodo Gizzard, Peppered Kponmo, Gizzard Stick Meat, Beef Stick Meat
- **Other Categories:** Fish & Meat Stews, Swallows, Set Meals, Sides, Yam Dishes, Beans Dishes

## Operational Details
- **Delivery Area:** Birmingham and UK-wide door-to-door delivery
- **Target Customers:** Homes, local universities, businesses, and events
- **Key Features:** Freshly prepared meals, authentic Nigerian food, prompt and efficient service

## Additional Information
- The company uses cookies to ensure the best experience on their website
- They have a secure checkout system
- Last updated Privacy Policy: February 2026
- The website uses cookies to ensure the best experience on their website
